introductions.pitch_30s: Hi, I'm Haolun. I'm a Software Engineer specializing in TypeScript, Angular, and NestJS. With a background as a volunteer soldier, I bring strong discipline and execution to every project. Currently, I'm an IT Intern completing my CS degree at NCUT, focused on building efficient and scalable web applications.
introductions.pitch_1min: Hi, I'm Haolun Wang. My background is a mix of high-intensity military service and modern software engineering. After serving as a volunteer soldier, I decided to dive into technology and am now a CS senior at NCUT while working as an IT Intern. I specialize in Angular Standalone architecture and NestJS backends. My military experience taught me the value of precision and grit, which I now channel into solving complex coding challenges and optimizing DevOps workflows with Docker and Nginx.

profile.name: 王顥倫
profile.title: 軟體工程師 / IT 實習生

introductions.pitch_30s: 你好，我是顥倫。我是一名專注於 TypeScript 全端開發的軟體工程師，擅長使用 Angular 與 NestJS。身為志願役士兵出身，我擁有極強的執行力與穩定性，目前正在勤益資工深造並擔任 IT 實習生，致力於開發高效能的 Web 系統。
introductions.pitch_1min: 你好，我是王顥倫。我擁有相對獨特的職涯轉換經歷，從志願役士兵轉戰資訊工程領域。目前我在勤益資工就讀，同時擔任 IT 實習生。技術層面我精進於 Angular 獨立元件架構與 NestJS 後端開發，並熟練運用 Docker 進行部署。軍旅生活培養了我高度的紀律與面對壓力的韌性，這讓我能以更嚴謹的態度面對程式除錯與架構設計，並確切達成專案目標。
